general.name: Restrictions - AirDrop, iCloud & External Drives Allowed
general.description: Same as Photo Studio but allows AirDrop
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>45EA033D-2048-48F4-A79B-AD606F1FAD6C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>45EA033D-2048-48F4-A79B-AD606F1FAD6C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions - AirDrop, iCloud & External Drives Allowed</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Same as Photo Studio but allows AirDrop</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>B4AE0764-2584-4B07-B85A-F844AE030BBC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>B4AE0764-2584-4B07-B85A-F844AE030BBC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E112A973-5975-4E8D-87A6-B40BBDAB0124</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>E112A973-5975-4E8D-87A6-B40BBDAB0124</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>574EF8AD-78DC-41B4-88F4-AB72D7B24A1C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>574EF8AD-78DC-41B4-88F4-AB72D7B24A1C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Support</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Device Access Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CA9A55B4-ABF9-436A-A7EF-0917ABE5CB69</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CA9A55B4-ABF9-436A-A7EF-0917ABE5CB69</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C71B2B3C-B795-4E53-A810-D15BA7B9AA2E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C71B2B3C-B795-4E53-A810-D15BA7B9AA2E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>whiteListEnabled</key><false/><key>WhiteList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4A47957D-D05C-4E97-9B3D-431B8F8E91D0</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.finder</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4A47957D-D05C-4E97-9B3D-431B8F8E91D0</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F2ED11F6-0842-423A-A7B0-366B87C693B7</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F2ED11F6-0842-423A-A7B0-366B87C693B7</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>511E9FD5-C93D-4CFE-8D29-FAAA4E145A33</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>511E9FD5-C93D-4CFE-8D29-FAAA4E145A33</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><true/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrationsSignIn</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><true/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><true/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><true/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><true/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0C18A63F-FBE5-4EF0-9369-0B930F828D66</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0C18A63F-FBE5-4EF0-9369-0B930F828D66</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preferences.appstore</string><string>com.apple.preference.digihub.discs</string><string>com.apple.ClassroomSettings</string><string>com.apple.preferences.extensions</string><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.prefpanel.fibrechannel</string><string>com.apple.preferences.icloud</string><string>com.apple.preference.ink</string><string>com.apple.preferences.internetaccounts</string><string>com.apple.preference.internet</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string><string>com.apple.preference.startupdisk</string><string>com.apple.Xsan</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D53D9793-B0A3-48C0-8864-ADED7C6FC050</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D53D9793-B0A3-48C0-8864-ADED7C6FC050</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>User Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>blankdvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-external</key><array/><key>blankcd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>dvdram</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>EAD0843B-E60B-4A84-8482-819DE841EDCC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>EAD0843B-E60B-4A84-8482-819DE841EDCC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>42428A92-7E44-4FB4-AA28-170CD557DA4C</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>42428A92-7E44-4FB4-AA28-170CD557DA4C</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.share.AirDrop</string><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
